tweets.text:
Every other styling app has the same problem.

Slidez doesn't. ⚡

Other apps make you paste links.

Hunt for the URL. Copy it. Open the app. Paste it. Hope it works.

Slidez? Just share directly from any app. Done.

Other apps show outfits on a mannequin or a random AI model.

Slidez shows them on YOU. One real photo. That's it.

Other apps style you in generic AI clothes no one sells.

Slidez uses real items from real brands. You can actually buy what you see.

Other apps give everyone the same suggestions.

Slidez reads your style — your colors, your silhouettes, your vibe — and builds around it.

This is what a styling app should have been from day one.

Try Slidez free — link in bio 👆
